violations.description: Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed handling ready-to-eat food (lettuce) with bare hands. Glove use required with ready-to-eat foods.
Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Low temp dish machine: 120 F - Good
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item (containers) were not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. Keep single-service items 6" off floor.
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
Bare hand contact avoided, single- use gloves, and utensils used (3 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Clean, maintained, tissue, vented, self-closing door (1 pt deducted)
